zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilk於1413年之前出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾約翰斯通時，他的父親Sir John Johnstone11409歲，母親Mrs John Johnstone43歲。他於1433年之後與Janet Dunbar結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1455年5月之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilk于1413年之前出生在苏格兰度福利爾約翰斯通时，他的父亲Sir John Johnstone11409岁，母亲Mrs John Johnstone43岁。他于1433年之后与Janet Dunbar结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1455年5月之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Johnstone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Johnston  .

variants.name: Johnston
meanings: Scottish: habitational name, deriving in most cases from the place so called in Annandale, in Dumfriesshire. This is derived from the genitive case of the personal name John + + Middle English ton ‘town, village, settlement’ (Old English tūn). There are other places in Scotland so called, including the city of Perth, which used to be known as Saint John's Toun, and some of these may also be sources of the surname.

English: habitational name from Johnson Hall (Staffordshire), recorded as Johannestonc. 1233 and Joneston in 1314. The placename means ‘John's settlement’, from the genitive case of the Middle English personal name Johan, Jon (see John ) + Middle English ton ‘town, village, settlement’.

History: As far as can be ascertained, most Scottish bearers of this surname are descendants of John, probably a Norman baron from England, who held lands at Johnstone in Annandale from the Bruce family in the late 12th century. His son Gilbert was the first to take the surname Johnstone and their descendants later held the earldom of Annandale.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilk was born before 1413, in Johnstone, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John Johnstone, was 11409 and his mother, Mrs John Johnstone, was 43. He married Janet Dunbar after 1433. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died before May 1455, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilk est né avant 1413, à Johnstone, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Johnstone, avait 11409 ans et sa mère, Mrs John Johnstone, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Janet Dunbar après 1433. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé avant mai 1455, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilk vor 1413 in Johnstone, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Johnstone 11409 und seine Mutter Mrs John Johnstone 43. Er hat nach 1433 Janet Dunbar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb vor Mai 1455 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilk è nato il prima del 1413 nel Johnstone, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John Johnstone, aveva 11409 anni e il suo madre, Mrs John Johnstone, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Janet Dunbar dopo il 1433. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì prima del maggio 1455, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilkが1413年以前にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアジョンストーンで生まれた時，父Sir John Johnstoneは11409歳，母Mrs John Johnstoneは43歳であった。1433年以後にJanet Dunbarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1455年5月以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilk(이)가 1413년 이전 스컷랜드 드프리실르 존스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Johnstone(은)는 11409세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs John Johnstone(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1433년 이후 Janet Dunbar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1455년 5월 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilk nasceu antes 1413, em Johnstone, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Johnstone, tinha 11409 anos e sua mãe, Mrs John Johnstone, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet Dunbar após 1433. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu antes maio de 1455, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilk родился перед 1413 г. в местности джонстоун, думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Johnstone было 11409 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs John Johnstone, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Dunbar после 1433 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер перед май 1455 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilk nació antes de 1413, en Johnstone, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Johnstone, tenía 11409 años y su mamá, Mrs John Johnstone, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Janet Dunbar después de 1433. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió antes de mayo de 1455, en su pueblo.
